title: agelanthus molleri
intro: Agelanthus molleri, also known as the 'witch thorn', is a plant species that belongs to the family Loranthaceae, and is native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agelanthus molleri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Agelanthus molleri can be found in various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
